description: A real estate listing document 'Property_Listing_Draft.docx' is open in Microsoft Word. It contains high-resolution images that make the file too large to email (~12MB). Optimize the document by cropping the first image (Exterior) to remove the left ~20% of the photo and applying the 'Simple Frame, White' picture style to all three images in the document. Compress all pictures to 'E-mail (96 ppi)' resolution, ensuring cropped areas are deleted to reduce the file size. Save the result as 'Property_Listing_Email.docx' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'. The final file must be under 3MB while retaining all three images.
